document.title: MI97-04248A ASSY COVER-A1_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY

sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval package for MI97-04248A ASSY COVER-A1_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY used with 2nd generation detector products.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides approval, BOM, control plan, work instruction, inspection, packing, and supplier declaration evidence for the Samsung detector middle block assembly part.
keyPoints: Material code is MI97-04248A with Revision 08 and description ASSY COVER-A1_MIDDLE_BLOCK_ASSY.
Model is listed as 2세대 디텍터 and packaging specification lists model name 2G 디텍터.
Vendor/supplier is listed as ㈜ 대일정공 / DAEIL PRECISION.
Control Plan Category is SOP and document no is CP-삼성전자-A-01.
Part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
Inspection criteria include MAX 568.0g assembly weight, tape placement checks, film insulation placement, label attachment, and Samsung exterior criteria.
Packaging specification lists MIDDLE_BLOCK, item code MI97-04248A, MG material, 5EA master pack and 1EA small pack.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous because the source appears to be a supplier/Samsung internal approval package, not a government regulatory authority document.
Multiple revision/version values appear in the source: Material Revision 08, ED08, Form Version 02, and standard Rev 7.
Multiple dates appear in the source, including E.D DATE 2023-01-25, 작성일 2023.01.02, Date(Orig.) 2018.11.30, packaging 작성일자 2019.01.16, and self-declaration 작성일 2021/01/21.
Product models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW are present in sourcePath metadata, while the document body uses 2세대 디텍터 and 2G 디텍터.
Preprocessed spreadsheet text includes repeated sheets, comma artifacts, misspellings, and partial table structure, so some extracted table relationships may have OCR/preprocessing ambiguity.
